Off Calendar Mar-16-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and [proposed] consent judgment" is granted.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
